caption: A soccer player in a blue long-sleeved training shirt, black pants, and red gloves practices on a green field in front of a stadium with red seating. He is positioned near a goal net, while another person wearing a black "Fly Emirates" shirt, black shorts, and a black face mask stands behind him. White perimeter boards display the logos and text "Ruta" and "Veleta". The player begins by tossing a soccer ball into the air with his right hand. As the sequence progresses, he tracks the ball with his gaze and reaches out with his gloved hands to catch it. The man in the black attire remains stationary in the background throughout the action. The scene is captured from a side profile, showing the player's movement from the initial toss to the final catch.
